title: David Port
compiled_truth: David Port is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-07), David Port sent 93 and received 713 emails, totalling 806 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rick Buy](people/rick-buy) (43), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (18), [Ted Murphy](people/ted-murphy) (15), [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (14), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (14).
